author: danceratopz
content:
Just following-up from the "next devnet" discussion in ACDT. 

The main focus of `glamsterdam-devnet-5` is CL stability: It is based `glamsterdam-devnet-4` with the addition of [EIP-8045: Exclude slashed validators from proposing](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8045). Launch is targeted for later this week.

<@592004585506340885>, in the call you listed all the PRs that should make it for the next consensus-specs alpha.9 release. This would be the release for `glamsterdam-devnet-5`. Anything else included in alpha.9 other than 8045?

author: qu0b
content: are we using execution specs 7.2 for glamseterdam devnet 5 or 7.3?

author: jtraglia
content:
Here's [the full set of changes](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/compare/v1.7.0-alpha.8...master) right now. I believe 8045 is the only consensus breaking change. Other notable changes for glamsterdam are:
* [Precompute head for update_proposer_boost_root](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5300)
* [Ensure bids are for a higher slot than their parent](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5302)
* [Embed payload_status into head fork choice check](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5250)
* [Ignore PTC attestations for empty assigned slots](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5281)
* [Use should_build_on_full for bid parent block hash](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5310)
* [Limit should_build_on_full checks to the previous slot](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5309)

author: spencer_tb
content: Lets use 7.2.0 (rather waiting for 7.3.0 would delay dev-5)

author: danceratopz
content:
Haha, thanks for the clarity <@577788234810130432>! 

I wanted to ask people to chime in, if they strongly want any EL changes on `glamsterdam-devnet-5`.

Here are the options:
1. No changes; let client teams focus on benchmarking optimizations on `bal-devnet-7`.
2. Spec changes to already SFId EIPs.
3. [EIP-8246 Remove SELFDESTRUCT Burn](https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/blob/master/EIPS/eip-8246.md).
 
The temp that I gauged in ACDT, was do to do 1. But do comment, if otherwise.

author: draganrakita
content: Would `glamsterdam-devnet-5` on EL side use `bal-devnet-7`? (Imo it makes sense, as it looks stable)
